claim_level: coefficient_landscape_diagnostic; deterministic reduced metrics are not nonlinear turbulent-flux claims, and nonlinear heat-flux points require replicated ensemble JSON

literature_context.optimization_of_nonlinear_turbulence_in_: Published boundary-mode scans show noisy time-averaged nonlinear heat fluxes; this artifact is the analogous pre-optimizer landscape diagnostic.

nonlinear_launch_manifest.postprocess_instruction: After running the generated nonlinear configs, build one ensemble JSON per coefficient and rerun this landscape with --nonlinear-ensemble coefficient_value:path.

sample_statistics.claim_scope: deterministic cross-sample dispersion over the configured surface/field-line/ky grid; not stochastic uncertainty and not a nonlinear heat-flux SEM
